English | Azərbaycanca

Lesson 5 - Family & People

Talk about family members

Goal

Talk about family members.

Content

1) Family Words

mother, father, brother, sister, friend

2) This Is My...

This is my mother. This is my friend.

3) He/She Is My...

He is my brother. She is my sister.

Practice

Introduce 3 Family Members

Example: This is my mother. This is my father. This is my sister.

Sentence Building

Build your family sentence

Type a family member to complete the sentence.

This is my _____.

Lesson Complete

Introduce people around you with short sentences.

Back to Lesson 4 Next: Lesson 6 Back to A0 Course
